code: import React from'react';import'./NavBar.css';import{useAuth}from'../context/authContext';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Navbar=()=>{const{logout}=useAuth();const navigate=useNavigate();const getCurrentPage=()=>{const path=window.location.pathname;return path.substring(1).split('.')[0]||'dashboard';};const handleNavigation=page=>{switch(page){case"blockers":navigate('/blockers');break;case"salesorders":navigate('/salesorders');break;case"dashboard":navigate('/home');break;case"graph":window.location.href="graphview.html";break;case"parts":window.location.href="parts.html";break;case"workorders":window.location.href="workorders.html";break;default:console.error("Unknown page: ".concat(page));}};const currentPage=getCurrentPage();return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("nav",{className:"navbar",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>handleNavigation('blockers'),className:currentPage==='blockers'?'active':'',children:"Blockers"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>handleNavigation('salesorders'),className:currentPage==='salesorders'?'active':'',children:"Salesorders"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>handleNavigation('dashboard'),className:currentPage==='dashboard'?'active':'',children:"Dashboard"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>handleNavigation('parts'),className:currentPage==='parts'?'active':'',children:"Parts"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>handleNavigation('workorders'),className:currentPage==='workorders'?'active':'',children:"Workorders"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>handleNavigation('graph'),className:currentPage==='graph'?'active':'',children:"Visualization"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:logout,children:"Logout"})]});};export default Navbar;
